programme.title: Molly of Denali: Ice Sculpture/ Tale of the Totem
programme.desc: Molly decides to organize an ice-sculpting competition in Qyah.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Mary Leaky/ I Am Alexander Hamilton
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: She Is the Moon of Moons/ Beats of Beijing
programme.desc: In Beijing, when the kids decide to give Luna her own special day, they discover that China already celebrates her with the Moon Festival.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Tree by the Nile Problem/ The Eid al-Adha Adventure
programme.desc: Cat gets stuck in a tree in Egypt. Cat is asked to give more than he expected.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: You Are Special/ Daniel Is Special
programme.desc: The children are putting on a show at school, each doing something that makes them special.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Hey! Sesame Street News
programme.desc: Cookie Monster becomes a journalist for Abby and Big Bird's newspaper, 'Hey Sesame Street News!'.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Fashion Fun/ Welcome Pinka Bear
programme.desc: Jasmine, Lila and Pinkalicious are inspired by fashion designs to create their own, unique outfits. But when Pinkalicious' design comes apart at the seams, she learns that with a little innovation, she can create an even more pinkaperfect dress.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Sweet Dough
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers prepare regional buns. Jam doughnuts and an enriched dough loaf are made.

programme.title: Great Performances: Shakespeare Live! From the Royal Shakespeare Company

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Durrells in Corfu
programme.desc: With the house guests getting rowdier, Louisa worries about the villa's reputation, but Spiros' increased presence continues to delight her. Margo finds a surprising way to bond with Maud. Gerry realizes he has feelings for Galini.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Devil's Dissections/ Criminal Pathology
programme.desc: The team is called back to a beach where serial killer Gregory Yates buried his many victims after another victim washes up. Rollins tries to coax Yates into confession, but he reveals a surprising bit of information.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Devil's Dissections/ Criminal Pathology
programme.desc: The team is called back to a beach where serial killer Gregory Yates buried his many victims after another victim washes up. Rollins tries to coax Yates into confession, but he reveals a surprising bit of information.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Nationwide Manhunt
programme.desc: Chicago P.D. detectives Lindsay and Dawson join the SVU in the hunt for two escaped murderers they helped to convict.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates
programme.desc: Gregory Yates escapes from prison and the team learns he intends to flee to New York. The SVU team informs Intelligence that he has been gathering information on Lindsay.

programme.title: WWE Raw
programme.desc: Great athletes and electrifying performers from the world of sports entertainment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pilot
programme.desc: A satirical look at three different families and the trials they deal with in life.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Bicycle Thief
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke prove to his mom that he is responsible enough to have the brand new bike they just got him. However, Phil ends up being the irresponsible one when a hot neighbour clouds his judgment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Incident
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell's mother drops in for a surprise visit, determined to make amends with everyone she offended during what has been deemed 'The Incident' at Jay and Gloria's wedding. No one is happy to see her, and it all comes to a head at dinner.

programme.title: Modern Family: Coal Digger
programme.desc: The whole family is invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football. However, an earlier incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things very awkward for Gloria and Claire, and things escalate when a not-so-flattering label is uttered.

programme.title: Modern Family: Run for Your Wife
programme.desc: As the kids head back to school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire is coping with an empty nest. Over at Jay's, he and Gloria are in disagreement over Manny's interesting choice of outfit for his first day of class.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: In the Line of Duty
programme.desc: After U.S. Ambassador Nancy Kelly escapes a terrorist attack at the U.S. consulate in Tunisia, Callen and Sam are sent on a secret and dangerous mission to obtain key evidence from the crime scene. Upon their return, Kelly helps provide information.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Black Wind
programme.desc: Callen and Sam go undercover as food truck owners in Mexico to find the source of an anthrax poisoning before it's used to create a bioweapon.

programme.title: Dateline: Twisted Tale
programme.desc: When Denise Huskins reappeared just two days after her boyfriend reported she was abducted, police accused the couple of perpetrating a hoax. But another, similar crime caused authorities to re-examine the case.

programme.title: Dateline: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: A teenage girl is murdered at a scenic spot on a Utah river. The case almost goes cold until a hairdresser turned detective, with the help of the victim's determined mom, finds the truth. Dennis Murphy reports.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Lucky Strike
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate a deadly police chase and the kidnapping of a young boy.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Forest for the Trees
programme.desc: Callen and Sam are kidnapped when they follow an anonymous tip about a missing NSA agent. When the team discovers they are missing they realize it could have been a trap set by terrorists.

programme.title: NCIS: Grace Period
programme.desc: The NCIS team discovers a tip about terrorist activity was a trap that resulted in the death of two agents. Blaming herself Agent Cassidy works with the team to track down the people responsible.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rotten
programme.desc: Guards are suspects in the sexual assault and beating death of a drug dealer in prison.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mercy
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a one-month-old baby found stuffed in a cooler.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pandora
programme.desc: An informant for the FBI, tracking on-line pedophiles, is brutally raped and murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Tortured
programme.desc: When the body of a torture survivor is found, detectives investigate the victim's past.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Privilege
programme.desc: After the apparent suicide of a girl, the detectives search through her past for skeletons in the closet.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Desperate
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered, the detectives rest their hopes of solving the crime on the victim's young son.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Appearances
programme.desc: The detectives search for a pedophile with a fetish for young beauty pageant queens.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mother Simpson

programme.title: The Office

programme.title: The Office: Night Out
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight decide to surprise Ryan in New York for a night of clubbing. Meanwhile, the Scranton branch is upset when they find out they have to come in on a Saturday for Ryan's website project. Jim's plan to save them has unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: Job Fair
programme.desc: Jim tries to land his biggest client ever with Andy and Kevin's help. Meanwhile, Michael sets up a booth at a local job fair being held at Pam's alma mater, to find the best and brightest for Dunder-Mifflin's summer internship.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: The Office: Company Picnic
programme.desc: Michael and Holly are reunited at the annual Dunder Mifflin company picnic. Meanwhile, the office competes in the picnic's volleyball tournament.

programme.title: The Office: Survivor Man
programme.desc: Michael goes on a deep woods adventure; Jim tries to revolutionize the office birthday party.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Everyone travels to Niagara Falls for Jim and Pam's wedding. The guys try to hook up while everyone tries to keep Pam's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Pam deals with Andy's sensitive injury; Kevin loses his shoes on the day of the wedding.

programme.title: Awkwafina Is Nora From Queens: Sneak Peek

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Monster Under the Bed
programme.desc: When three hotel workers don't turn up for their shift, a bizarre series of discoveries reveals a twisted workplace love triangle.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet

programme.title: Street Outlaws: A $50,000 Weekend

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bristol: Race to $100K

programme.title: Street Outlaws: 8-City Showdown
programme.desc: JJ Da Boss has invited eight of the fastest street racing teams in the country to hit the Memphis asphalt for a chance to win $100,000. Chips are drawn and the bracket is established. setting the scene for the craziest first-round match-ups ever.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Memphis Against the World
programme.desc: Welcome to Memphis, where JJ and his family of racers do things a little differently. When JJ invites some of the biggest names in street racing to come to Memphis and race for money, the Memphis racers have to step up for their city.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: 8-City Showdown
programme.desc: JJ Da Boss has invited eight of the fastest street racing teams in the country to hit the Memphis asphalt for a chance to win $100,000. Chips are drawn and the bracket is established. setting the scene for the craziest first-round match-ups ever.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Alabama Prison Riot

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Jungle Abduction
programme.desc: A company fishing trip turns into a nightmare when Texas oil worker Jerel Shaffer is abducted at gunpoint.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Quecreek Mine Disaster
programme.desc: July 24 2002, Quecreek Mine, Pennsylvania: 9 miners are trapped in a mine filling with 90 million gallons of water. A huge drill starts to work on a rescue hole, but even that doesn't go according to plan and the miners doubt they'll make it out alive.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Somali Pirate Attack
programme.desc: In 2008, British security guards Carl Mason and Mike Kelly were assigned to protect the oil tanker Biscaglia as it travelled through the Gulf of Aden; it was supposed to be an easy job until the ship was attacked by gun-toting, drug-crazed Somali pirates.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stonehenge of the Holy Land

programme.title: What on Earth?: Strange Symbols in the Desert

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery in the Outback
programme.desc: A giant carving of a strange creature suddenly appears in the Australian Outback. Mysterious bright green lights illuminate the seas around Thailand. Top secret activity is discovered at Iran's nuclear facility.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden Cities of the Maya
programme.desc: A young boy makes international headlines when he uses satellite images to discover lost cities of the Maya. Satellite images might point to a modern-day genocide. Trees in China seem to be spelling out a sinister message.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Doomsday Forest
programme.desc: When mysterious structures are discovered deep in a remote forest, experts investigate if this strange site was the long-lost birthplace of a top-secret Nazi project that produced some of the deadliest weapons the world had ever seen.

programme.title: What on Earth?

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Stranglehold

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Python Tourniquet

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Clayton English
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: James Davis

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Paranoia

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Oh, Pol-y Night
programme.desc: It is the holiday season in Michigan and Dr. Pol and his team make their patient list, check it twice, and treat those who are naughty, spotty, snotty, and nice.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Show Me the Bunny
programme.desc: Broken toes, worm infestations and nursing puppies send the clinic into a whirlwind. The chaos is usually routine for the team, but Dr. Pol and Diane are short-handed.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Doc Nose Best
programme.desc: Neither rain nor snow can stand in the way of the team at the clinic, but this year, the weather is putting them to the test.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Twist and Snout
programme.desc: Pol Veterinary Services has an exciting new addition to the clinic staff: Dr. Emily's husband, Tony.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth
programme.desc: Astronomers seek the answer to a second earth with spectroscopy, direct imaging and telescopes. They hope to find evidence of atmospheres, magnetospheres and signs of life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: NASA's Journey to Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology and cutting-edge science that protects astronauts from the Red Planet's deadliest killers.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: The Boy From Bristol
programme.desc: When a friend of Aaron Hernandez is found dead near his home, investigators turn their gaze on the New England Patriot. At trial, a sensational family drama unfolds as Aaron fights for his life. Later, links to another brutal slaying emerge.

programme.title: Mystery on the Mississippi
programme.desc: A parent's worst nightmare is realized when the body of an 11-year-old is found 130 miles away from home, dumped along the icy banks of the Mississippi. Fear spreads across the region as the community grapples with the unspeakable crime.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: The Boy From Bristol

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Dana MacKay is found viciously beaten to death while her husband is out of town. One suspect comes to mind: a woman who's been stalking Dana for the last month. But it will take a cellphone with X-rated text messages to unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Mississippi Mayhem
programme.desc: Greg May, 56, is getting ready to move to Florida with a new girlfriend when he vanishes without a trace. Police aren't sure if the tattoo artist turned Civil War collector is alive or dead until their investigation uncovers a horrific plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Dream Home
programme.desc: A Peruvian immigrant is discovered murdered and police have to ask could there be more to the American success story than meets the eye.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Crime Writer
programme.desc: Brook Baker, a college journalism major, dreamt of becoming an investigative reporter. When the popular co-ed is brutally murdered while researching a controversial article, the police must sort through hundreds of suspects to find her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Fallen
programme.desc: When a pastor loses two wives in suspicious accidents, authorities wonder: was it terrible luck ... or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Without a Trace
programme.desc: When 29-year-old Carrie Olson doesn’t show up for work and is reported missing, an entire community pulls together in the search. Detectives suspect foul play and soon focus their investigation on two men in her life.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Firepower
programme.desc: In this action packed episode we see the secret device that will tear apart terrorist bombs; the new squad weapon that will get you out of an ambush; the latest surface to air missile and the US Army's latest sniper rifle.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Nisswa Cabin
programme.desc: When a family's inherited 60-year-old lakeside cabin needs updating and more room for gatherings, the brothers blow out the back wall to take over the huge porch.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Lakeside Scenic Porch Redo
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform an uninviting, rarely used porch into a warm and rustic family gathering space. They add reclaimed barn wood to the ceiling, rough-sawn hardwood flooring and a huge sliding door looking toward the lake.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Quonset Hut to Guest House
programme.desc: The guys use reclaimed materials to create bright and functional guest quarters in the dark, unsafe storage space of a World War II Quonset hut. The sleeping area features custom beds, and the kitchen is build out with butcher block countertops.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Open Concept Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a 1950s cabin to give a family the entertaining space they've always wanted. They remove paneling and knock down walls to create an open kitchen. They replace old carpet with new flooring that's perfect for going barefoot.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Time Capsule Cabin
programme.desc: Brock and Chase update a fourth-generation family cabin on Lake Charlotte, Minnesota. They give one room a bigger feel with new paint and a custom barn wood-framed window, and a breakfast nook adds a great space for family gatherings.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Rustic on the River
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle an old river cabin and transform the living space with timber beams, wood floors and a custom entertainment center. Then, a wood slat wall defines the space and is accented by a walnut kitchen island with hand wrought metal legs.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Retro To Rustic
programme.desc: Brock and Chase gut a lakeside retro guesthouse and give it a floor-to-ceiling rustic overhaul. They replace laminate flooring with wood, make a custom live-edge kitchen island and add a custom door frame to the main room.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Cozy Traditional Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a lackluster family cabin by giving it a beautiful open floor plan. The living room, dining room and kitchen come alive when the brothers add a center island with handmade wooden stools and ceiling beams to look like timber.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce II
programme.desc: No matter how good of a cook you are, sooner or later your seafood is going to let you down. Alton Brown has the sauces that will save your dinner every time.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Rebuilding the Resistance
programme.desc: Resistance recruits need an escort getting off of Dantooine, but, unfortunately, Tam is assigned to destroy the recruits.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wand Ambition/ Lost in Transylvation
programme.desc: Mavis' lost magic wand falls into the wrong hands and Hotel Transylvania gets trapped inside a snow globe. Mavis finally gets a word in the Vamptionary!

programme.desc: Mavis is so excited that she is finally getting her portrait hung in the Hall of Draculas. Wendy has never had a crush, so Mavis sets out to help her find one.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Prey Date
programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.desc: The kids go to space and join Celery in a race between them, Uncle Zucchini, and Auntie Eggplant and Zerk.

programme.desc: Nature Cat and his pals are called into action to figure out how to stop a marsh from flooding.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: Clubhouse Clash/ Raise the Reef
programme.desc: Splash and friends and Jerome and the fusiliers must figure out who can use the clubhouse.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Suki’s Bone/ Brand New Flag

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Theodore Roosevelt/ I Am Eleanor Roosevelt
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: You Froze My Shorts/ What a Matryoshka
programme.desc: The kids and Luna find a way to keep the Circo warm.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Groovy Sixties Problem/ Bad Jack Is Back
programme.desc: Peg and Cat help Peg’s Grandmom create a groovy birthday present for Granddad based on his favorite numbers, the sixties. Later, when Bad Jack returns to tickle the townspeople, a surprise guest shows Peg and Cat how to fend off the bad guys.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Super Daniel!/ Play Pretend
programme.desc: Daniel and Grandpere pretend to be superheroes and take Dad's lunchbox to the Clock Factory.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Bath Time for Blanky
programme.desc: Abby brings Rudy to the laundromat to wash his stinky blanky. Grover is the new laundromat attendant, but he doesn't know how to use the machines. Luckily, Chris brings in his dirty clothes, too, and shows them all how to use a washing machine and dryer.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Amazing Sled Run/ Frost Fairy
programme.desc: It's a snow day for Pinkalicious, Peter, Rafael and Jasmine; Pinkalicious and Peter find Felix the Frost Fairy fast asleep on the job.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Biscuits
programme.desc: The Signature demands delivery of perfectly baked crispbreads. Time and temperature work against the bakers in producing chocolate tea cakes in the Technical. The Showstopper tests the quality of the bake and how well it works as a building material.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Sanditon
programme.desc: Young Stringer presses Tom for back pay owed his builders, currently toiling under dangerous conditions. Aided by the new doctor, Charlotte and Sidney respond to an emergency. Miss Lambe pines for her absent lover.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Howards End
programme.desc: Mrs. Wilcox's family is surprised by her final request. The Schlegels face eviction. The Schlegel sisters take up the cause of Jacky Bast's husband.

programme.title: Vienna Blood: The Last Seance
programme.desc: Junior doctor Max Liebermann asks to observe a criminal case for his studies. Inspector Oskar Rheinhardt reluctantly offers him full access to the case of a murdered woman.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fallacy
programme.desc: An assaulted female partygoer kills her attacker, and then claims it was done in self-defence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Futility
programme.desc: Detectives attempt to obtain an indictment after arresting a man accused of serial rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Russian Brides
programme.desc: Captain Cragen goes undercover when a murder at Brighton Beach unveils a deadly foreign bride business.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Educated Guess
programme.desc: A man claims he witnessed a rape in the break room of the mental hospital he resides in, but the alleged victim denies the assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spiraling Down
programme.desc: When a friend of Amaro's reports his daughter missing, detectives find her working as a prostitute. While trying to arrest Johns on rape charges with a minor, they come across a perp who is a football legend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Theater Tricks
programme.desc: When an actress is raped on stage, the audience believes it is part of the show. Detectives later learn that the director gave the audience members, including the assailant, masks to wear during the performance.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Child's Welfare
programme.desc: Benson's brother shows up needing help when Child Services threatens to take his children away, but the seemingly simple case turns into a disaster for everyone involved.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Justice Denied
programme.desc: When a rape victim is brought in after a harrowing ordeal, Benson recognizes the suspect's M.O. from a case she solved eight years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Street Revenge
programme.desc: A string of rapes inspires a group of vigilantes to unite against neighbourhood crime and the NYPD. The SVU squad struggles to find a lead in the case until one of the vigilantes is attacked.

programme.title: Dare Me: Rapprochement
programme.desc: Beth reasserts her authority by enticing the squad to a wild, adult party at the Playland Motel.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Wrong Side of the Bars

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chin Check
programme.desc: After the discovery of large amounts of cop killer ammo, the Intelligence Unit is in a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now Is Always Temporary
programme.desc: The intelligence squad is in hot pursuit of a counterfeiting ring as Atwater and Burgess come across something unexpected in a hoarder's home.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Thirty Balloons
programme.desc: A run in with a psychotic woman leads the Intelligence Unit to discover a drug smuggling operation which has put several lives in peril.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crash and Burn
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two fatal accidents: a car crash and carbon monoxide poisoning.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Expiration Date
programme.desc: When Callen and Sam are tasked with apprehending a spy contracted by the CIA, Sam is shot and the team enlists the help of Thapa, the elite Nepali soldier from their past, to help to find the shooter, Also, Kensi and Deeks have their first argument.

programme.title: NCIS: Cover Story
programme.desc: McGee is horrified when a Petty Officer on whom he based the character for his latest book is murdered. With little to go on, the team pushes him to figure out who could have accessed his secret manuscript.

programme.title: NCIS: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Vance partners with Gibbs and returns to field duty when a murder case is connected to a former NCIS agent he locked up for stealing evidence.

programme.title: NCIS: Lockdown

programme.title: NCIS: Viral

programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's undisciplined 14-year-old grandson's visit gives new meaning to generation gap.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: Frasier: The Adventures of Bad Boy and Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Kate and Frasier have difficulty resisting temptation, but when they finally give in to their emotions, it is accidentally broadcast across Seattle and everyone wants to know the identity of 'Dirty Girl.'

programme.title: Frasier: The Last Time I Saw Maris
programme.desc: Maris goes missing for days and when she eventually returns, she asks Niles for a divorce.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier the Grinch
programme.desc: When the wrong Christmas gifts arrive for Frederick, Frasier is forced to go to the mall.

programme.title: Frasier: It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
programme.desc: Frasier realizes the depth of his feelings for Kate, only to find out that she's moving the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Is Enceinte
programme.desc: Lucy is forced to go to Ricky's nightclub to tell him she is going to have a baby.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Pregnant Women Are Unpredictable
programme.desc: With the baby coming, Ricky decides that Lucy should stay in bed while he does the chores.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Show Biz Swan Song
programme.desc: Despite her condition, Lucy is determined to participate in a gay 90's review with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Hires An English Tutor
programme.desc: Lucy hires a tutor so her baby will be raised in the 'proper vocal environment.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Kirsten Vangsness and Actress Erinn Hayes visits.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Hallmark Channel's Cat Bowl and Kitten Bowl VII commentator and NFL star, Rashad Jennings visits. Grammy winner Gloria Gaynor prepares cream of turkey soup.

programme.title: Movie: Date With Love
programme.desc: After a-list actress, Alex Allen, has an epic Hollywood meltdown, she is in need of some positive publicity. Salvation comes in the form of a small town boy's video 'promposal' in which the student invites Alex to prom.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: The Office: Cafe Disco
programme.desc: Michael gets into the café/ disco scene. Meanwhile, Pam and Jim decide to take a secret trip.

programme.title: The Office: Company Picnic
programme.desc: Michael and Holly are reunited at the annual Dunder Mifflin company picnic. Meanwhile, the office competes in the picnic's volleyball tournament.

programme.title: The Office: Gossip
programme.desc: Michael feels left out as the rest of the office gossips about the summer interns. While Michael searches for the next juicy rumour to share, Andy struggles with heterosexuality.

programme.title: Drunk History: Sports Heroes
programme.desc: Jim Thorpe is named the greatest athlete of the 20th century, Babe Didrikson breaks down gender barriers in sports, and Jim Abbott achieves prominence as a pitcher despite having only one hand.

programme.title: Drunk History: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pirate John Lafitte helps Andrew Jackson defeat the British during the War of 1812, Sam Zemurray becomes a banana kingpin and Louis Armstrong becomes a jazz legend.

programme.title: Drunk History: Chicago
programme.desc: Al Capone gets destroyed by an unlikely enemy; police go to war against protesters.

programme.title: Drunk History: Whistleblowers
programme.desc: Rich histories are re-enacted by favourite actors.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: January 21, 2020
programme.desc: Actor BD Wong visits.

programme.title: Lights Out With David Spade: Doug Benson, Mary Lynn Rajskub and Steve Ranazzizi
programme.desc: Panelists Doug Benson, Mary Lynn Rajskub and Steve Ranazzizi join David Spade to talk about the latest in pop culture.

programme.title: South Park: Fishsticks
programme.desc: Cartman and Jimmy come up with the funniest joke of all time. When a humourless hip-hop star doesn't get the joke, he tries to bring justice to its creators.

programme.title: South Park: The Tooth Fairy's Tats 2000
programme.desc: When Cartman discovers the Tooth Fairy is paying a premium price for lost teeth, he and the boys seize the opportunity to make some cash.

programme.title: South Park: Child Abduction Is Not Funny
programme.desc: In an effort to protect their children from kidnappers, the parents hire the owner of City Wok Restaurant to build the Great Wall of South Park. During the construction he is harrassed by Mongolians intent on breaking down the City Wall.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah
programme.desc: A reality-based look at news, trends, pop culture, current events and politics with Trevor Noah.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Summer Sucks
programme.desc: The entire town is gearing up for the annual Fourth of July celebration when a state-wide ban on fireworks is imposed. Jimbo and Ned cross the border into Mexico to get some Grade-A illegal fireworks.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: I'm a Little Bit Country
programme.desc: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day. Meanwhile, it's the right vs. the left when the town is split between different opinions on war.
