programme.desc: Amber Milt goes behind-the-scenes of some of Broadway's best musicals: Cats and Come from Away.

programme.title: The Closer: Problem Child
programme.desc: The case of a troubled missing boy quickly turns into a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Sudden Death
programme.desc: When Sanchez's little brother is shot, the team turns its efforts to finding out if this is related to a past case of the detective's. Meanwhile, a reporter accuses Brenda and her squad of only working on cases that are connected to the rich and powerful.

programme.title: The Closer: Split Ends
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson has her hands full trying to solve a murder when a hairdresser on a movie set is found dead. Meanwhile, Brenda's folks are in town pressuring her to set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Closer: Tijuana Brass
programme.desc: Brenda faces a potential mess when the bodies of two south-of-the-border detectives are found dead in the back of a truck.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pregnant Pause
programme.desc: An evening of romance between Carrie and Doug results in a totally unexpected surprise.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Walk, Man
programme.desc: In order to spend more time with Carrie, Doug hires Spence's dog walker to walk Arthur.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sight Gag
programme.desc: Doug gives Carrie laser eye surgery for her birthday, but she is left temporarily blinded.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mean Streak
programme.desc: Doug is about to break the record for the highest number of consecutive deliveries.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Friender Bender
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's friendship with Victor and Kelly is tested after Doug hits their car.

programme.title: The King of Queens: No Retreat
programme.desc: Doug goes with Carrie on her company retreat while Arthur is left to fend for himself.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ticker Treat
programme.desc: Arthur gets tricked by Doug's spooky Halloween decorations and lands in the hospital.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Lyin' Hearted
programme.desc: When Arthur goes into the hospital for surgery, Doug bumps into an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair
programme.desc: When cancer researcher Dr. George Blumenschein ends up admitted at his own hospital a toxic work environment may be to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Monster Under the Bed
programme.desc: When three hotel workers don't turn up for their shift, a bizarre series of discoveries reveals a twisted workplace love triangle.

programme.title: On the Story
programme.desc: The hottest issues of the week, ranging from presidential politics to pop culture.

programme.title: True Crime Live
programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Drew Peterson: Killer Charm
programme.desc: In 2007, Stacy Peterson, the wife of veteran police sergeant Drew Peterson, goes missing. As police launch an intensive search to find her the case of the missing mother raises shocking new questions about the death of Peterson's third wife years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Teaming up with a former competitor, Mark and Digger sell their legacy shine in a neighbouring county. Mike and Jerry double their shine output only to find customers are getting their shine from another source. Mountain man Mark tracks an intruder.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Drone vs. Shotgun
programme.desc: Josh breaks into his secret stash to build a new still site, and breaks out his shotgun when a drone invades his airspace. Daniel hits the jackpot selling for Mark and Digger, while Mike finds his steady customers mysteriously less thirsty than usual.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Busted by the Law
programme.desc: Tim devises a plan to make backwoods shine with Tickle for the first time in years. Short on patience and a key ingredient, Mark and Digger's bootleg operation comes under threat. In a series first, two Tennessee shiners get busted by cops on camera.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Toxic Work Environment
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Josh digs deep and uncovers the worst way to foster a toxic work environment. Tickle's carpentry skills shine, while Mark and Digger take a big swing on an ingredient that doesn't pass the smell test.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle to the Rescue
programme.desc: Tickle answers the call when Josh needs help salvaging an abandoned submarine still and his season. Mark and Digger take on a specialty bourbon made from Indian corn. Facing jail time, Van and Ewok gamble their freedom for another run.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Bone Valley
programme.desc: Dusty and the team must capture a giant calf-eating snake and venture into an abandoned factory to save upper Florida from invasive pythons.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Pony Express
programme.desc: Moonshine season is in full swing. In Tennessee, Mark and Digger are ready to test out their 3-pot still. Chico and Sondra employ a four legged still hand. Josh rides under the radar in South Carolina. And Tim hopes to teach JT about his backwoods roots.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle to the Rescue
programme.desc: Tickle answers the call when Josh needs help salvaging an abandoned submarine still and his season. Mark and Digger take on a specialty bourbon made from Indian corn. Facing jail time, Van and Ewok gamble their freedom for another run.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Bone Valley
programme.desc: Dusty and the team must capture a giant calf-eating snake and venture into an abandoned factory to save upper Florida from invasive pythons.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Adios, Mr. Still
programme.desc: Gunfire erupts in the bamboo patch just as Josh and Bill fire up their still for the first time this season. Meanwhile Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom run a batch of President George Washington's rye whiskey, and Tickle hits the skids when his still is sabotaged.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Toxic Work Environment
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Josh digs deep and uncovers the worst way to foster a toxic work environment. Tickle's carpentry skills shine, while Mark and Digger take a big swing on an ingredient that doesn't pass the smell test.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Forest From Hell
programme.desc: Lost in a mile-high Araucaria forest of South America, Army Combat Veteran EJ Snyder and Wilderness Survivalist Jeff Zausch must brave venomous pit vipers, fight a wild boar and survive the treacherous terrain in their search for rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Battle of Brazil
programme.desc: Stranded in the scorching hot savannas of Southern Brazil, Naked and Afraid fan favorites EJ Snyder and Jeff Zausch must find a way to survive this bone-dry environment without water or food and navigate back to civilization.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Dying of Thirst
programme.desc: EJ and Jeff brave the blazing high desert heat of eastern Utah. Their quest for water and rescue forces them to descend a sheer canyon wall, climb the face of a steep mesa and endure a hellish journey through one of the deadliest deserts in the country.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Gator Bait
programme.desc: Waist-deep in the backwater swamps of Louisiana's Atchafalaya river basin, EJ and Jeff find themselves surrounded by alligators and poisonous snakes. With no clear way to safety, they must find a direction out of the bayou and onto safe dry land.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Blackout
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Republic of Georgia, located between Russia and Turkey, EJ and Jeff find themselves in a nightmarish scenario as they're surrounded by 800-pound bears and trapped in a pitch-black cavern.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Man vs. Amazon
programme.desc: Two survivalists journey to the most hostile environment on the planet to take on the Amazon without modern conveniences or clothing. They attempt to survive while battling piranhas, jaguars, and mosquitoes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Pain Forest
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to endure 21 days in the Malaysian rainforest. With relentless rainstorms, they will have to fight the elements with only their knowledge of the wilderness.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Christina and Steve take on the Mexican jungles of Quintana Roo for 21 days. But with each sleepless bug-filled night tensions between them mount, and in the end, the greatest threat to their survival might be each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Himalayan Hell
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the high altitude and extreme cold of the Himalayan foothills in northern India. In the face of severe dehydration, one survivalist's debilitating illness threatens to derail both their chances of success.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rise Above
programme.desc: An openly gay horse trainer and an anxious wilderness instructor take on the daunting jungle of Amazonia. Constant rain and a lack of resources make one survivalist hit rock bottom quickly, while the other is forced to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Washed Out
programme.desc: An extreme athlete and a book smart bartender tackle an Ecuadorian cloud forest where it rains daily.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alligator Alley
programme.desc: One Army mom and one Marine are shipped out to the sweltering swamps of the Florida Everglades where they will put their military survival training to the test, facing 8-foot alligators, venomous water moccasins, and bloodthirsty mosquitoes.

programme.title: Hot & Heavy: Mixed Weight Love
programme.desc: Three couples, where the men are hot and the women are obese, endure strain on their relationships and attempt to overcome adversity.

programme.title: Hot & Heavy: Ghosts of the Past

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Modern Treehouse

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Lifted Lodge Treehouse

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Tennessee Treasure
programme.desc: The crew rebuilds the Minor Hill cabin in Franklin, Tennessee. Mark Bowe checks out a log cabin addition to an 1806 stone home and then tours a local whiskey distillery built inside a timber-frame barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Go Big or Go Home

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Snake Bye
programme.desc: Porsha is taken by surprise when ex-fiancé Dennis pops up with a ring and unexpected question. Toronto Carnival becomes a circus of intrigue at the final dinner when accusations fly about infidelities and a mysterious lady.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Hairy Situation
programme.desc: Eva is determined to get Marley's last name legally changed, but her biological father may present a roadblock. Now that Dennis has re-proposed to Porsha, he has to also win her family back. Tanya gets messy and dishes out a secret she has on Kenya.

programme.title: Spy Games: Welcome to Spy Games

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: On Lock Down

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: 40 and Fancy Free

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin find themselves in hot water when a motorcycle pullover goes south. Later, a woman brings in her recovered IROC-Z and leaves with a genius thief-busting solution.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Change of Heart
programme.desc: Danny has a last-minute change of heart and can't let go of a classic car he promised to sell to a loyal customer. Later, Kevin and Scott try to score a bike on their own, while Danny ditches lunch for a vintage Cadillac.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Horn Ultimatum

programme.desc: Danny builds an extra special car for a customer who wants something no one else has.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chumlee's Challenge

programme.title: Counting Cars: Blackjack Bike
programme.desc: A casino VIP visits Count's Kustoms to commission a hi-end chopper build for a huge blackjack bonus prize. Plus, shop detailer Roli sets his sights on a jaw dropping chopper of his own.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Charger Surprise
programme.desc: Danny decides to feature the 12 favourite cars in his collection in an official Count's Kustoms calendar, and later, a customer wants Danny to build him a classic Charger just like his dad used to have.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Calendar

programme.title: Counting Cars: Electric Ride
programme.desc: Pawn Stars' 'Old Man' Mr. Harrison stops by Count's Kustoms with a job that is as unique and old fashioned as he is. Later, the guys aren't in love with Roli's new special custom project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: It Hurst So Good
programme.desc: The Plymouth Road Runner has always eluded Danny, but when he finally finds one and buys it, it becomes a nightmare for Kevin. When Kevin tries to shut down the project, Danny pulls a fast one.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mo' Parts Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Danny is doubly-blessed when a his-and-hers restoration is commissioned for a 1970 Plymouth Road Runner and a 1970 Dodge Coronet. Plus, Roli hopes to become the next airbrusher, but Ryan and Mike have other plans for him.

programme.title: Counting Cars: I Want My Caddy Back
programme.desc: Danny gets a call from Kevin's brother, who wants to sell Danny a 1969 Cadillac, but they can't let Kevin know or else he'll never trust his brother or Danny again.

programme.desc: Legends of giants from long-lost civilizations have puzzled experts for centuries, and now using cutting-edge archaeological science, experts investigate where these stories began and if there is any truth to these mythical monsters.

programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Monsters and Myths

programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle

programme.desc: Investigating the attacks on a Texas prosecutor and district attorney who were both shot dead.

programme.desc: A family man targeted for death lives to climb out of his own 'grave.' Go inside the sting that took down a hit man-for-hire scheme.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Drowning in Despair

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder Has Two Faces

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder is a Filthy Business

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Bright Lake House
programme.desc: Brock and Chase are giving a lake house some much needed updates. They get rid of the rubber flooring, carpet and dated accordion door. Brock creates a one of a kind artwork, made of barnwood. He adds sliding barn doors to give the home some rustic charm.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Midcentury Modern Rustic
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle a lake house and turn it into a mid-century modern oasis. They give the existing fireplace an easy-to-use gas insert and creating a custom entertainment center with a barn wood backdrop.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s First Floor Restoration
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by homeowners Scott and Rhonda to fully restore the first floor sunroom, living room and dining room of their 1700s stone home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740 Little House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to restore a 1740 stone home that sits behind couple Kelly and Rob's suburban 1990s home. They call it the "little house," and it sat right in the middle of the action of one of the most famous Revolutionary War battles.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Original Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is called on to renovate a dated kitchen believed to be in the same spot as the original one that was built in the 1800s. By restoring much of the kitchen's history, Jeff and team are able to bring in a classic farmhouse style to the home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1780 Spring House Revival
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on by John and Karine to do a total restoration of their 1780 spring house, which is in dire need of help. The joists and floorboards are almost completely rotten, and the painted stone is crumbling.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s First Floor Surprises
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is called on by Meghan and Justin to restore three rooms in their 1803 stone farmhouse. The team gets to work on the dining room, parlour and living room. They uncover a massive surprise when they start digging in the parlour.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Uncovering a 1700s Home
programme.desc: After inheriting a 1700s stone home that's been in the family since 1906, a couple calls on Jeff to peel away the dated decor. They want to uncover as much of the original history as possible. Jeff and his team refinish the wood flooring and much more.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.desc: Rich and his team race to stay ahead of the helicopter drops. It is unclear whether a new builder on Tom's site a friend or foe. And an eight point earthquake leaves Creig's build on shaky ground.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Don't Try This at Home
programme.desc: Creig's carpenter Jim pays the ultimate price for building alone in remote Alaska, Rich's crew performs a balancing act to get out of the mud and a worst-case scenario nails Tom's build and it's old school techniques to the rescue.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Getting Awkward
programme.desc: Rich's build is down to two workers which will make it tough to reach their milestones, nothing but wall-to-wall trouble may cause Tom's build to come tumbling down and Creig's build is fraught with costly miscalculations and tensions with Jim.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat on a Stick

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light It Up!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: When his wife wins custody of their children, an actor poses as a female housekeeper in order to spend time with them.

programme.title: Curb Your Enthusiasm
programme.desc: Larry David finds himself in unusual predicaments at home, work and around town.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: Long Shot
programme.desc: A free-spirited journalist bumps into his childhood crush, who happens to be running for the Presidency. She impulsively hires him as her speechwriter, and sparks begin to fly between the two childhood friends despite their very different lives.

programme.title: The Outsider
programme.desc: This drama explores the investigation into the gruesome murder of a local boy.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.desc: A luxury cruise vessel travels the solar system in this sci-fi comedy.

programme.title: The New Pope
programme.desc: A dramatization of life in the Vatican and within the modern papacy.

programme.title: Movie: Rock the Kasbah
programme.desc: A has-been rock manager gets stranded in Afghanistan, where he discovers a young girl with a beautiful singing voice. Sure that she could win a national singing competition, he takes her on an adventure-of-a-lifetime in the hopes of reviving his career.

programme.title: Movie: The Ice Harvest
programme.desc: Two friends plan to make off with their criminal employer's money, but nerves get the best of them, and they find themselves on the run.

programme.title: Movie: Indignation
programme.desc: A brilliant working class Jewish boy travels on scholarship to a small college in Ohio. Avoiding the draft, he finds himself facing the imposing dean of the college and falling in love with a classmate. His relationships put his plans to the test.

programme.title: 50 Children: The Rescue Mission of Mr. and Mrs. Kraus
programme.desc: A dramatic and previously untold story of a couple who traveled to Nazi Germany in the spring of 1939 to save 50 Jewish children.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: A lonely man meets a woman on the Internet who happens to be in prison. When she breaks out to be with him, she proceeds to wreak havoc on his middle-class life.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Seventh Son
programme.desc: The last remaining knight in a mystical order seeks out a prophesized hero, the seventh son of a seventh son, to fight a powerful witch bent on unleashing vengeance in a war between mankind and the supernatural.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: Thank You for Smoking
programme.desc: A spokesman for the tobacco companies tries to be a role model for his 12-year-old son while putting a positive spin on cigarettes.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: Movie: Red Eye
programme.desc: A flight home turns into a nightmare for Lisa Reisert when she is taken hostage by a fellow passenger, who is involved in an assassination plot against the head of Homeland Security. Lisa tries to stop the plot and keep her family from being harmed too.

programme.title: High Maintenance
programme.desc: A marijuana deliveryman drops his product off to clients in New York City.

programme.desc: A famed monster hunter must battle Count Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's Monster.

programme.title: Movie: American Son
programme.desc: A broken couple is reunited in a Florida police station in hopes of recovering their missing teenage son.

programme.title: Movie: Just a Kiss
programme.desc: A group of thirtysomethings in Manhattan find themselves struggling with fidelity.

programme.title: Movie: Scary Movie 3

programme.title: Movie: Just Like Heaven

programme.title: Movie: Stay Alive
programme.desc: A group of teens discover that the horror video game in their possession is more realistic than they thought, when members of the group begin to die in the same brutal manner they did in the game.

programme.title: Movie: Molly's Game

programme.title: Movie: Shaft

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold

programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: An ostrich lays an egg and the siblings rush to incubate it. Later, Bear gets a special visitor and the family prepares to celebrate Billy and Ami's anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Gary of The Jungle
programme.desc: All-star survivalist and wildcard Gary Golding takes on a jungle for the first time completely alone in Belize. Without a partner, Gary forms a bond with a turtle he names Timmy but a deep cut and dangerous infection threaten Gary's challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lacey's Journey
programme.desc: All-Star survivalist Lacey Jones takes us through her first three challenges in Belize, Ecuador, and South Africa. With all-new insights, Lacey prepares herself for redemption in Africa for a 21-day challenge completely alone, coming up next.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lacey's Journey

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: High-End Timber Frame Kitchen In Brevard, Nc
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders build a timber frame kitchen that will be the centerpiece of a high-end mountain retreat in Brevard, NC. Later, Mark and the guys visit some of the architect's other spectacular log homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Picture Perfect Cabin
programme.desc: Mark's client has a painting of a log cabin he wants to replicate so the team sets out to find the perfect cabin for the job. After settling on a cabin from an old project, the Barnwood Builders rebuild the structure with its huge logs in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Split Crew
programme.desc: Half the crew is in Ohio to save a 1830s log home, while the other half is back in West Virginia to tear down an old log barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Seeking Ore
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are modern prospectors who look for business opportunities on old mining claims. Homesteader Judd and his family will need their help to re-open the mine, and build three much needed weatherproof structures before winter hits.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Paydirt or Bust
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are called to renovate a mine's machine shop for mining to begin generating income. With 57 veins that could average a profit of upwards of $250,000 a day, the guys must negotiate a deal that could be their biggest payoff yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Line of Fire
programme.desc: Marty has to create an evacuation ark for livestock while Matt devises a layer of fire protection to save a homestead in danger of a wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Marty tackles an off-grid hydropower system. Matt creates a meat smoker. One of the Raneys is injured in a surprise accident.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bethany's Story
programme.desc: Bethany has two daughters who live in fear of losing their mom to her food addiction. Once an addiction counselor, Bethany has gotten so big than she can no longer work. Now she risks losing her life, if Dr. Now can't help curb her addiction.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: J.T.'s Story
programme.desc: J.T. is almost 900lbs with a 100-lb lymphedema mass on his leg and a food addiction that is bound to kill him if he doesn't change. His girlfriend takes him to Houston, but when his behavior drives her away, J.T. is left with only Dr. Now to help.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Mo Toes, Mo Problems
programme.desc: A man with an enormous lump on his foot creates a mystery for Dr. Vincent. Dr. Schaeffer faces a case of a wart cluster that is all over a man's foot and patient Kiara has the first double big toe the doctor has ever come face-to-face with.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: J.T.'s Story
programme.desc: J.T. is almost 900lbs with a 100-lb lymphedema mass on his leg and a food addiction that is bound to kill him if he doesn't change. His girlfriend takes him to Houston, but when his behavior drives her away, J.T. is left with only Dr. Now to help.

programme.title: Rattled: A Paralyzed Mother's Story
programme.desc: Quadriplegic Rachelle Friedman, the 'paralyzed bride', defies the odds by having her own child. Unable to walk and without dexterity in her hands, Rachelle must learn to cope with a newborn with the same determination she approaches all aspects of life.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Casey D.
programme.desc: Casey is a transsexual who has been living as a woman for the past nine years. Stacy and Clinton help this transgender woman find a style that reflects the confident, happy woman that she is.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Katherine
programme.desc: 22-year-old journalism student gets and updated look months before graduation day.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Lonely in Flagstaff
programme.desc: Meri returns to Flagstaff but still feels alone. When she meets the other Sister Wives for lunch, old tensions bubble to the surface. Meanwhile Kody has a plan to reunite the family.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Four Wives, One House?
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Kody finally presents to his family his pitch for all four wives to live in one big house. Janelle actually likes the idea, but Christine is dead set against it. Merry Christmas!

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps and he can barely breathe. Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps. Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer
programme.desc: Melissa has spent years trying to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt. Tyler's cancer fears have prevented him from having his huge head lumps examined. Tahj is plagued by painful boils. Amber has ear keloids that can no longer be ignored.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Somewhere in My Pile
programme.desc: Beverly's clutter fills every last square inch of her home. Upstairs, her three beloved dogs have made the space absolutely unlivable. With the threat of the city condemning her home, Beverly must clear the hoard or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Three Apartments, Three Hoarders
programme.desc: An apartment complex has not one, not two, but three extreme hoarders. For years their hoarding has gone unchecked but with building now under strict management, everything is about to change.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Maja's Story
programme.desc: Maja moves to Houston to undertake a difficult weight-loss journey with the support of her boyfriend Christian. But when Christian decides he's had enough and leaves Maja high and dry, she will discover that the only person she can count on is herself.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick and Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa have been communicating daily for years, but have never met. Before Nick heads to college, he wants to go meet Melissa, and find out if she's the person he thinks she is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Robin and Wayne
programme.desc: It's been three years and Robin is ready to meet her attractive yet elusive online love in real life. Nev and Max want to help, but what they uncover may be too much for Robin to handle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nae and Brannon
programme.desc: Nev and Max attempt to help a young woman named Nae track down her elusive internet celebrity crush and soon find themselves embroiled in a Catfish conspiracy!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Alfred and Adonis
programme.desc: Moving on from a toxic breakup, Alfred's thirsty to find Adonis, the elusive man of his dreams. But as they dig for answers, word that Nev and Kamie are in town leads to the most explosive confrontation in the Catfish history.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sparkayla and Maritha
programme.desc: Kiana's convinced that her wife Sparkayla is being catfished by a girl claiming to be her long-lost sister! Nev and Kamie perform the first ever DNA test in Catfish history to uncover the real roots of this family deception.

programme.title: True Life Crime: Killed for Gender Identity or Secrets?
programme.desc: 16-year-old Kedarie Johnson, a gender fluid teen, begins walking home from a friend's house. Despite expressing fear that they were being followed, Kedarie makes the trip alone. Later that night, shots ring out and Kedarie's body is soon discovered.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ridic Remix

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXXVIII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ja Rule

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Shirlene and James
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Kamie help a lovestruck Navajo girl on her vision quest to find the Zuni man she loves, a man who not only admitted to being a drug smuggler but also claimed to have died, leaving everyone desperate for answers!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney and Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on an LBGT site four years ago and is head-over-heels in love, even though Brenell refuses to video chat with her. Whitney is desperate to find out why and hopes that what she knows about Brenell is true.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim and Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over a decade, but he's refused to meet her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kailani and Sam

programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront home on Kitsap Peninsula in Washington. He wants to crab in his own backyard while she enjoys sunset views over the Pacific, but finding a home with water access in their price range will be a challenge.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Beachfront or Bust in Gulf Shores
programme.desc: A family decides it's time to find their own piece of paradise in Gulf Shores, Alabama. They're looking for a home large enough for their three kids, space for entertaining and plenty of bedrooms for visiting family and friends.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Hammer, Hammer, Pedal, Pedal
programme.desc: A family's entire life revolves around cycling, but their house is cramped and doesn't support their active lifestyle. Drew and Jonathan take on the challenge of transforming the house into a forever home that works both on and off a bicycle.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Heritage and Handiwork in Sweden
programme.desc: An American man wants to trace his Swedish ancestry and a mysterious family heirloom leads him to Vasteras. While his fiancee is willing to give up everything familiar in Colorado to follow him, she is steadfast about bringing her family values with her.

programme.title: House Hunters: Oversized Wish List in Kansas City
programme.desc: A surgeon is moving his wife and family to Kansas City, Missouri, for a new job. She wants a big, bright farmhouse with some acreage while he wants a home with character, in a traditional neighborhood and close to work.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Beach Hunters of Kitsap Peninsula
programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront home on Kitsap Peninsula in Washington. He wants to crab in his own backyard while she enjoys sunset views over the Pacific, but finding a home with water access in their price range will be a challenge.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Beachfront or Bust in Gulf Shores
programme.desc: A family decides it's time to find their own piece of paradise in Gulf Shores, Alabama. They're looking for a home large enough for their three kids, space for entertaining and plenty of bedrooms for visiting family and friends.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Marrying the Old and the New
programme.desc: A couple's vintage home has lost some of its charm after nine years of living there with their twin sons. In order to stay, they agree that the house needs a major update, but they can't agree on exactly what needs to change and how.

programme.title: Flipping Virgins: Atlanta Flip Curve Ball
programme.desc: Busy parents Noelle and Ron are raising three kids and running a business together, and now they're determined to tackle their first house flip. Luckily, realtor and flipping expert Egypt Sherrod steps in to help keep them and their project on track.

programme.title: Mountain Life: Hendersonville Mountain Home
programme.desc: A busy couple is ready to escape the noise and bustle of Charlotte, North Carolina and surround themselves with breathtaking views in a Blue Ridge Mountain vacation home.

programme.title: Mountain Life: From City to Nature in Humboldt County, California
programme.desc: A couple wants to escape the rat race in crowded Seattle and get back to their roots in northern California's Humboldt County.

programme.title: Sarah Off the Grid: Down to the Details
programme.desc: As the house approaches completion, Sarah wants every detail to be perfect. When it comes to big ticket items like hardwood flooring, 'perfect' is a moving target. Sarah and Alex have to pull the team together to finish the Living Room.

programme.title: Sarah Off the Grid: Off the Grid!
programme.desc: The open concept main floor evolves into distinct kitchen and dining room layouts. When Sarah is pulled away from the site for a work commitment, disaster threatens, and the weather wreaks havoc as the team tries to finish the exterior.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Nest: Rent's Too High, Time to Buy
programme.desc: Newlyweds came home to Birmingham, Alabama, from their destination wedding to find that their rent is being raised beyond their budget. She feels the pressure to find something fast while he wants an amazing backyard view and a man cave.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Nest: Vegas Dreams
programme.desc: A couple of newlyweds are ready to move out of his bachelor pad and settle down in glittery Las Vegas. With a budget of $1 million, they hope to find a home with an office for her, a theater room for him and private space for her outspoken mother.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Welcome to Your Speakeasy
programme.desc: A young couple decided to skip the wedding and invest in a home. But the house they could afford has the same, outdated features of every other house on the block, and they're looking for some personalized upgrades.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Mid-century Modern Meets Jasmine Roth
programme.desc: MJ and Mike's cookie-cutter home is outdated and unwelcoming, and they are desperate for some customization. Jasmine dismantles the concrete fortress in front of their home and gives them a space to finally enjoy their front yard.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: A House That Feels Like a Home
programme.desc: Flight attendants Wendy and Annette travel often but hate returning to their cookie-cutter home. With their $65,000 budget, they hope Jasmine can create outdoor spaces for them to enjoy and reconfigure their layout to give them much needed storage.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Story Book Home No More
programme.desc: A single mom and her two daughters feel the flow of their home isn't the best use of space for their family. Jasmine updates the exterior, refinishes the original hardwood floors and opens up the living space by creating a new kitchen and dining room.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Beige to Beautiful
programme.desc: A family is living in a builder-grade house that looks like all the others on the block. Inside, it's overrun with toys and disconnected by compartmentalized rooms. Jasmine swaps the floor plan and delivers a Scandinavian design with custom features.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: You Guys Need a Retreat
programme.desc: A couple with two kids is in desperate need of more space for family functions and an end-of-day retreat for mom. Jasmine updates the exterior with new paint, shutters and an outdoor pergola. Inside she upgrades the kitchen.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Respect the Tiki
programme.desc: A couple has tried to customize their home with a tiki look, but needs some professional help for a real renovation. Jasmine adds a new fence and a stunning patio outside. Inside she creates a modern kitchen with a new storage space.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Sunset Sitting Area
programme.desc: An active couple feels their home lacks the style and layout they desire. Jasmine adds custom stone to the exterior, as well as a stunning seating area. Then, she opens up the kitchen with an island and creates a custom cat wall.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Unwinding on Anna Maria Island, Florida
programme.desc: A couple is on the hunt for a piece of paradise for them and their kids on Florida's Anna Maria Island. They want a place where they can unwind from their busy life in Venice, Florida, but agreeing on amenities may not be so easy.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Northwest Coast House Hunt

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Delaware Bay House Hunt
programme.desc: Sisters Maddie and Eloise are in Broadkill Beach, Delaware, searching for a destination beach home their whole family can enjoy.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: The Shores of Lake Michigan

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Oahu House Hunt

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Amazing Z
programme.desc: It seems every time Danny finds a project for the shop, he winds up keeping it. Now Ryan and Kevin are determined to find a car Danny will actually fix up, and flip.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Dee's Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Twisted Sister's Dee Snider brings Danny and the gang a brand new BMW Z4 that he wants Count-ified for his wife Suzette as an anniversary present. A simple paint job turns to disaster when she is not happy with the finished product, not once, but twice.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Low Riding Lincoln
programme.desc: Danny and Ryan have big plans for a low riding Lincoln. Lonnie, one of the shop's long time painters, wants to give his Lincoln lowrider a new, but simple, paint job but that's not going to happen.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Steel Takedown Bow
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging a crusader's dagger from a thick rod of W1 steel. The finalists return home to forge their own version of Robin Hood's steel takedown bow.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Barbarian Spatha
programme.desc: Four smiths must forge a Pugio, the dagger said to have murdered Julius Caesar, and then the Roman Spatha, one of the most vicious swords in Roman history.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Cutting Deeper: Charlemagne's Sword
programme.desc: Four smiths crack open crucibles to reveal surprise metals they'll use to forge signature blades. The two surviving smiths move on to their home forges to recreate the legendary sword of King Charlemagne: the Joyeuse.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Spanish Conquistador Sword
programme.desc: The smiths are tasked with recreating the WWII Special Forces Smatchet Knife. After intense testing, the two remaining smiths head home to recreate the infamous Spanish Conquistador sword.

programme.title: Vikings: Valhalla Can Wait
programme.desc: Bjorn muses over a difficult decision, while Ubbe and Torvi leave Kattegat in search of new lands. Oleg's plans to invade Scandinavia begin to take shape and King Harald is baffled by a mysterious raiding party.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Hussar Saber
programme.desc: Four smiths are tasked with using the canister method to forge a blade. The final two smiths head home where they must recreate the Austro-Hungarian Hussar Saber, the signature weapon of history's deadly cavalrymen.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Shot and a Shave
programme.desc: Rick is offered some of the craziest items ever to enter the store, from a quilt made of celebrity's signatures to an 1845 Harpers Ferry musket.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Peeping Pawn
programme.desc: The team is presented with a rare 1776 Massachusetts penny made by Paul Revere. Rick gets the chance to buy a hand grenade made by a top-secret American World War II spy program. A man hopes to sell his 1950s peep show machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent and Deadly
programme.desc: A piece of marble from Abraham Lincoln's tomb enters the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnocchio
programme.desc: Some handcrafted Pinocchio dolls wander into the shop. A guy brings in a Cy Young baseball card from 1909. A man comes by with a harmonica that once belonged to 'Aerosmith' front man Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick 'n' Roll
programme.desc: Rick attends Rock 'n' Roll Fantasy Camp and gets a chance to perform with rock legend Roger Daltrey of The Who. Meanwhile, Chumlee and the Old Man check out a collection of tin toys from the early 1900s. Then, a tonsillotome finds its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chumlee's Last Laugh
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a massive Dukes of Hazzard toy collection. Then, time flies when a pocket watch engraved with Henry Ford II's signature lands in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: All In
programme.desc: A poker cheating device finds its way into the shop. Then, a mysterious suicide ring believed to be from WWII finds its way into Rick's fingers.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Put Up Your Nukes
programme.desc: A seller claims he has a cover for a thermonuclear warhead. Then, Corey swings into action when a mandolin from Bob Wills' Texas Playboys comes into the shop. Later, Chumlee tries to find something he's better at than Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tricky Ricky
programme.desc: Go long with the Pawn Stars when a signed jersey from San Diego Chargers quarterback Dan Fouts gets thrown into the shop. Then, Rick tries to learn the trick of the trade when Harry Blackstone's vanishing birdcage appears.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mail Mayhem
programme.desc: A signed first edition of 'The Wizard of Oz' and a one of a kind Turbo Drive II arcade game arrive at the shop. Also, Rick goes searching for a package that was supposedly delivered to him.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick's Roulette
programme.desc: Rick is in Hollywood to auction off some of the shop's coolest finds. Back in Vegas, Corey and Chum check out an Ultra 4 race car. Then, Rick checks out one of the largest Mickey Mouse collections in the world.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock Stock and Two Nickel Barrels
programme.desc: A rare movie poster for John Wanye's first ever film is offered to Rick for a hefty price. Chum inspects a pair of nickel-plated pistols whose creator is claimed to be the Victorian era's most famous gun maker.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spider Pawn
programme.desc: Rick looks into the authenticity of a rare 1936 Zippo prototype. Corey's wants to snag an antique rotary phone for the right price. Chumlee meets Marvel Comics creator and legendary writer Stan Lee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sign of the Times
programme.desc: Rick Dale joins Rick to prove to Corey that he struck oil with an old Gulf sign. Then, a 1930s collectible from the Indy 500 sends Chumlee racing, and Corey snoops out what might be a Charles Schulz original illustration of Charlie Brown, and more.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning for Treble
programme.desc: In Chicago, Rick meets a wrestling legend and gets a chance at a Michael Jordan championship jersey. Meanwhile, Chum looks to score big on a 300-yeat-old violin. Afterwards, Corey and Chum bet on a vintage Batman playhouse.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Mom: Black Mold and An Old Hot Dog
programme.desc: Christy helps Jill adjust to being a new foster mother and Bonnie has trouble convincing tenants that she's a good building manager.

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie learn that she kept a very big secret.

programme.title: Mom: Tantric Sex and the Sprouted Flute
programme.desc: Christy annoys everyone when she adopts her new boyfriend Brad's healthy lifestyle, and Bonnie and Adam decide to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good in the 'Hood
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda takes Jack and Diane to her part of town in a black neighbourhood and claims the twins are scared of their own community. Dre and Rhonda take them to a local diner to show them why it's so special.

programme.title: Black-ish: FriDre Night Lights
programme.desc: Dre is thrilled when Jack makes the football team, but Bow is against the idea. Meanwhile, Diane wants Junior to drive her to her first real date with Jalen, but Junior overstays his welcome.

programme.title: Black-ish: Is It Desert or Dessert
programme.desc: Dre has concerns about Jack and Diane spending the weekend with their friends' family in the desert. Meanwhile, Pops is forced to come to terms with how he treats women after he helps set Junior up.

programme.title: Movie: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: A mall security guard takes his teenage daughter with him on a trip to Las Vegas, where he's attending a Security Guard Expo. When he learns of a heist and is scoffed at by casino security, he takes it upon himself to take down the criminals.

programme.title: Movie: Let's Be Cops
programme.desc: Two goofball buddies are mistaken for real cops when they dress up as police officers for a costume party. Fighting crime is all fun and games until they become wrapped up in a web of real mobsters and crooked detectives.

programme.title: Movie: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
programme.desc: Two brothers place an ad seeking dates to their sister's wedding. They find two girls, who secretly just want a free trip. The girls pretend to be respectable, but once they get to Hawaii, the brothers realize they are extremely wild and unhinged.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Brothers
programme.desc: Data commandeers the Enterprise to take him home to his elderly creator.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Suddenly Human
programme.desc: Picard risks war when he refuses to return a human boy to his alien parents.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Remember Me
programme.desc: Wesley's experiment with warp fields results in the mysterious disappearance of the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Legacy
programme.desc: A mission leads the crew to Tasha Yar's birthplace, where they encounter her sister.

programme.title: Movie: The Transporter
programme.desc: An outlaw finds his life becoming all the more dangerous when he turns against a gang of criminals.

programme.title: Movie: The Punisher
programme.desc: A special agent becomes a vigilante after a ruthless assassin murders all of his loved ones during a family reunion.

programme.title: Movie: The Transporter

programme.title: Movie: The Punisher
programme.desc: A special agent becomes a vigilante after a ruthless assassin murders all of his loved ones during a family reunion.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Man vs. Everest
programme.desc: Adventurer and successful Everest climber, Bear Grylls, tells the stories of the hardcore adventurers for whom simply conquering Everest is not enough.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Sahara
programme.desc: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he shows you just what it takes to get out alive even when it means eating one of the world's deadliest scorpions.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Desert Survivor
programme.desc: In the hottest place on earth, Bear Grylls shows you how to get out alive as he tackles his biggest challenge yet - skinning and disembowelling a dead camel for water, food and shelter for a night under the stars.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Panama
programme.desc: In the lethal mangroves and infamous viper pits of Panama, Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges and some grisly eats to show you how to get out alive.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Jungle
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles the jungle of Panama where he encounters some extreme eats, and shows you how to get out alive.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Patagonia
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges, wild weather, and eats bugs and worms to show you how to stay alive in the icy wilderness of Patagonia.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Andes Adventure
programme.desc: In the icy wilderness of Patagonia, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges on a deadly glacier pushing himself to the limit to show you how to stay alive.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Beginner's Yuck
programme.desc: The Pol Clinic veterans take a new vet, Dr. Erin, under their wing, as they flip cows, clamp calves, tube horses, and treat a rescue rooster with an injured foot.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Return of Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: Weird and abnormal things happen every day at Pol Veterinary Services, but things are downright strange this week as Dr. Pol and his team treat some of the most bizarre patients they have ever seen.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Paw and Order
programme.desc: Pol Veterinary Services receives a call about a rescued Saint Bernard in a life-threatening situation.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: World's Largest Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The world's largest and most advanced cruise ship races against the clock to board thousands of passengers in Miami, and using new technology, an expert team navigates the behemoth ship through perilous waters.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: Titans of Power
programme.desc: The world's biggest tidal turbine is a cutting-edge machine that can revolutionize the energy industry, but first, a crew of engineers must use the latest tech to battle dangerous tides and successfully install it.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: US Navy Super Fleet
programme.desc: The world's toughest naval fleet are put to the test as cutting-edge aircraft carriers, combat ships, and amphibious assault vehicles and their crews undergo challenging warfare exercises.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Tallest Bridge
programme.desc: As tall as a skyscraper, the Millau Viaduct braves deadly wind speeds over an immense abyss, and we go inside the story behind this modern wonder.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Dubai's Impossible Island
programme.desc: The man-made islands of Dubai are modern-day engineering marvels that turn the Arabian Sea into high-priced real estate, and today, a team of expert engineers use cutting-edge technology to build a brand-new city district where there was once only water.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: NYC Mega Tower
programme.desc: The skinniest skyscraper in the world will soon become New York's third tallest, and using an innovative, gravity-defying design, this colossal megastructure is breaking all the rules of engineering.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: MythBusters: Supersonic Ping Pong/ Ice Cannon
programme.desc: In this ballistics bonanza, Adam and Jamie ask if supersonic ping pong can go lethally wrong, while Kari, Grant and Tory light the frozen fuse on a cannon made of ice!
