programme.desc: The man-made islands of Dubai are modern-day engineering marvels that turn the Arabian Sea into high-priced real estate, and today, a team of expert engineers use cutting-edge technology to build a brand-new city district where there was once only water.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bloodlust: Real Vampires
programme.desc: From Bram Stoker's 1897 novel to the rise of the undead in popular culture, Vampires have caught our attention in recent decades. We travel to Bulgaria to investigate claims of a real Vampire burial and examine accounts of vampires.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Chandra Levy
programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Blood Lust
programme.desc: The city of Atlanta is gripped with fear as a deadly killer prowls the streets for unsuspecting victims with a powerful gun.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Student/ Left in Danger/ Lady on a Bridge
programme.desc: Detectives search for a missing student, hunt down an alleged gang member, and save a woman threatening suicide on a bridge.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Broken Home
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young mother is ambushed at home and shot at close range. Detective Rob Barrere's case depends solely on the eyewitness account of a four-year-old girl and leads to another brutal death.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: Mother's Day/ Somebody Knows
programme.desc: Detectives hit the streets in search of a 48-year-old woman whose two grown daughters fear she is the victim of foul play.

programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Cartel City
programme.desc: The team's K-9 sniffs out a package with black tar heroin hidden inside a child's teddy bear.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Show Me the Money

programme.title: Crime 360: Midnight Shootout

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor

programme.title: Murder Calls: Under Seige
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, saying her husband is exchanging gunfire with intruders, and her toddler is outside with them. Police find the boy safe, though the husband is dead.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Tears For My Mother
programme.desc: A man calls 911 claiming he found his ex-girlfriend dead, and his behavior on the call leads police to wonder if he could be involved. Investigators tirelessly gather evidence to convict a killer whose unchecked rage left a young son motherless.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Deadly Ride: Part One
programme.desc: The former Uber driver who terrorized Michigan City during a deadly shooting rampage on February 20, 2016 has been sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Deadly Ride: Part Two
programme.desc: The former Uber driver who terrorized Michigan City during a deadly shooting rampage on February 20, 2016 has been sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: A night of partying by fraternity brothers ends with a knock on the door and gunfire. One student is dead, three are wounded, and a freshman freely admits he was the shooter. He claims it was self-defence. But others say he was looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Fortress of War
programme.desc: The Story of how two CIA operatives, in search of Osama bin Laden, stop a Taliban uprising in an Afghan fortress. They are outnumbered leaving one operative to pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Featuring interviews with the world's leading experts, this film delves into the amazing lost world of the Minoans and highlights the startling parallels between Bronze Age Thera and Plato's Atlantis.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Featuring interviews with the world's leading experts, this film delves into the amazing lost world of the Minoans and highlights the startling parallels between Bronze Age Thera and Plato's Atlantis.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Fortress of War
programme.desc: The Story of how two CIA operatives, in search of Osama bin Laden, stop a Taliban uprising in an Afghan fortress. They are outnumbered leaving one operative to pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: John Dillinger
programme.desc: John Dillinger was the most brazen of the infamous criminals of the Great Depression, and probably the most brutal, credited with a string of bank robberies and at least a dozen murders across Indiana in 1933.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.desc: Rich's team uses brute strength to muscle up the 800lb mainframe beam. It's all hands on deck at Tom's build as lumber shortages linger and Creig finally gets things to line up just as he loses his last helper.

programme.title: Building Alaska: No Quit
programme.desc: While gale-force winds create danger for Tom's team, and rainy conditions threaten Creig's build, Sitka is nothing but sunny which provides the perfect conditions for Rich to have a whale of a good time.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sparks Fly
programme.desc: Sparks fly at Tom's camp as a worker showdown threatens the project. Different sparks at Rich's camp brings power to the people and bear attacks leave Jodi on edge at Creig's camp.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Impending weather is making crunch time at the builds that much more desperate. Rich is forced to make a crucial building decision. Tom risks stranding his workers. Creig battles freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael Jr. take things to the next level as they decide to go into business together. They purchase an outdated, suburban property and face a wonky layout, too many stairs and open-concept headaches.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: The Golden Oak Menace
programme.desc: Bug and his team travel to West Petaluma, CA, to take down a 95-year-old egg house that's dangerously close to a high-voltage power line.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: C&O Railway
programme.desc: The team travels to Clifton Forge, Virginia, to conquer C&O Railway's vast repair space. They work to salvage the steam engine repair plant by saving railway bases and corrugated glass. Later, they take apart a baby grand piano.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Victorian Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage mantles, cabinets, sinks and a round window from a late Victorian-style home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cosby Brothers Mill
programme.desc: Mike and Robert give Tay a history lesson with an old dentistry x-ray machine before the team loads up for a project in Grottoes, VA. They start at Cosby Brothers Mill where they hope to salvage some old mill parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marine Salvage
programme.desc: Mike and Robert head to Amelia Island, Florida, and get lessons in diving and safety so they can salvage under water. They recover old ship parts from the bottom of the ocean and transform them into an original piece.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Victorian Free Classic House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs return to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage another home before it gets demolished. The house has some great Eastlake hardware worth salvaging as well as Majorca tile, mantles and pocket doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Price Fuller Machine Shop
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, Grayson and Tay head to the Machine Shop they bought to see what they can find. The team finds items for new builds. As they're renovating the house on their property, they find many new builds are needed. Mike and Tay make a coffee bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former United Methodist Church
programme.desc: The crew head to Laurel, Delaware to salvage what they can from a former Methodist church that fell victim to water damage. The team removes pews, a bronze bell, and a greenhouse skylight before heading back to the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: On the menu is a 24 layer chocolate cake and succulent duck smothered in gravy and cheese.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Things start heating up when Tyler Florence, Ted Allen, Ina Garten, The Neelys and others share their best ever hot and spicy dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Simply Irresistible
programme.desc: Find out what various chefs have to say about roasted chicken, sticky buns, and seafood.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Regional Favorites
programme.desc: Go to New Orleans for shrimp po' boy and Maine for the ultimate lobster feast.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best spicy foods in restaurants across the country. He's in the kitchen with spice-loving chefs preparing the hottest recipes in America and revealing their tongue-scorching secrets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: A Very Sticky Problem/ Forward Marsh
programme.desc: Mazu sees life through a raptor’s eyes when she gets stuck to Cror by some tar. Rocky hopes to get the best viewing spot to watch the "winter lights" dance across the night sky.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Frozen Giganto/ Dinosia
programme.desc: Explore the world with dinosaur friends in search of the biggest dino of them all!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Prank Wheelz/ Where's the Wolfie Wheelz?
programme.desc: The Wolfies turn their Wolf Wheelz into Prank Wheelz. Luna Girl and Motsuki are controlling the Wolf Wheelz to wreak havoc causing the Wolfies and the PJ Masks to work together.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say Aaahg
programme.desc: Timmy's tonsils are coming out and nurse Vicky is determined to make his visit unpleasant.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Fairy Tales
programme.desc: In order to put a restless Poof to sleep, Wanda decides to read him a book of fairy tales.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Exchange Student/ Crystal Ball Birthday
programme.desc: When an exchange student comes to visit, he tells a scary story that make the chipmunks think Dave is in danger. Annie and Amber offer to plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor in the process.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dave Rebooted/ Germs
programme.desc: Dave gets temporary amnesia so the boys trick him into letting them skip school and go on a ski trip instead.Theodore becomes obsessed with cleanliness after a speaker at school talks to the class about the danger of germs.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Spaced Out/ Transparents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for an authentic alien; Cosmo and Wanda must pose as real parents.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Tim Visible/ That Ol' Black Magic
programme.desc: Timmy's shot at the attendance award at school is threatened by a pounding from Francis.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Escape from Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Patty Creature Feature/ Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hello Bikini Bottom!
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them and their 'world tour,' himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Pat takes SpongeBob on as his role model; Bob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Ian Malcolm returns to the island to help with strange power surges throughout the park.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe Is Untied/ Something Smells
programme.desc: Squid is put in charge of getting Pat a new pair of shoes; Bob eats sea-onion ice cream.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
